successBody: Your account is being created automatically. You'll get an email within a few minutes with a temporary password to log in.
pendingBody: Your payment is still being confirmed. Once it clears, we'll create your account and email you a temporary password.
failedBody: The card may have been declined, or something went wrong. Please try again, or reach out if this keeps happening.
unknownBody: There's no payment info here. If you're still trying to subscribe, head back to Services.
